titleStmt.title: SII 22.342: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 342. (A.R. No. 342 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJARĀJA I—23rd YEAR (A.D. 1007-08)

summary.p: This has the introduction Tirumagaḷpōla etc. It records an endowment of 90 kaḻañju of gold invested with the Ūrār of Vēḻkaḷa Veṇpākkam a dēvadāna village of Gōvindapāḍi-Dēvar by Kāmaṉ Kōmaṇḍai a native of Ēḻūr-Amaṇai in Venbaikkuḍi-nāḍu a division of Pāṇḍi-nāḍu also called Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, with the condition that they were to measure out every year, as interest on the amount, 120 kalam of paddy in the temple, for the (daily) offering of akkāradalai preparation to the God. The donor also presented 15 cows to the temple for the supply of milk as ingredient to the offering.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamumeṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamu n=tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻi Ellāyāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī korājarāja rājakesariparmarāṉa śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattumuṉṟāvatu tāmarkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭu śrī kovindapāṭit tevar tevatāṉam veḻkaḷa veṇpākkattūrom kai
yeḻuttu pāṇṭināṭāṉa rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭu Eḻūr Amaṇaiyuṭaiyāṉ kāmaṉ komaṇṭai kaiyāl yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava poṉ dharma kaṭṭaḷait tuḷainiṟai toṇṇūṟṟuk kaḻañcu poṉ koṇṭu kaṭavom Ippoṉ toṇṇūṟṟuk kaḻañcukkumivaṉ śrī govindapāṭi Emperumāṉukku vaitta Akkāra ṭalaikku niṉṟāṉāṉa marakkālāl Āṇṭuvarai poṉ kaḻañcukku poliyūṭṭuneṟ kalaṉetūṇiyāka Ittoṇṇūṟṟuk kaḻañcukkum vanta nel ṉūṟṟirupatiṉ kalamum pākkūli paṭṭu śrī govindapāṭi Emperumāṉ tirumuṟṟattukeka�koṭuceṉṟu Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum paḻuvāmai candrādityavat Aḷantukuṭuppomāṉom Innel nūṟṟirupatiṉ kalattukkum Ūrom paṭṭa pāk
kūli nellukku Ikkāmaṉ kommaṇṭaipakkal poṉṉaṟakkoṇṭu śilā lekhai ceytukuṭuttom veṉkaḷa veṇpākkattūrom Ūrom colla Eḻuti ṉeṉ Ivvūr madhyasthaṉ tappi taṇṇintuḻāyeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ikkom maṇṭai vaicca Akkāraṭalaikku pālamutukku Ivaṉ vacca pacu patiṉaiñcu Iddharmam śrī vaiyiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.342 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
